title: PRA Legal Instruments - 2022
content_markdown:
# PRA Legal Instruments - 2022

**Total:** 10

- **PRA2022/10**: PRA Rulebook: Financial Services Compensation Scheme Instrument 2022 (Published: 28/11/2022)
- **PRA2022/9**: PRA Rulebook: CRR Firms: Own Funds and Eligible Liabilities Instrument 2022 (Published: 26/09/2022)
- **PRA2022/8**: PRA Rulebook: CRR Firms: (CRR 2 and Other Consequentials) Modification Instrument 2022 (Published: 08/08/2022)
- **PRA2022/7**: PRA Rulebook: CRR Firms: CRR Rule Administration Instrument 2022 (Published: 08/08/2022)
- **PRA2022/6**: PRA Rulebook: Investment Firms Prudential Regime Amendment Instrument 2022 (Published: 08/08/2022)
- **PRA2022/5**: PRA Rulebook: Glossary (Solvency II) Amendment Instrument 2022 (Published: 07/07/2022)
- **PRA2022/4**: PRA Rulebook: PRA Fees Amendment (No 1) Instrument 2022 (Published: 30/06/2022)
- **PRA2022/3**: PRA Rulebook: Non Authorised Persons: FSCS Management Expenses Levy Limit and Base Costs Instrument 2022 (Published: 25/03/2022)
- **PRA2022/2**: PRA Rulebook: CRR Firms: Operational Continuity Instrument 2022 (Published: 11/03/2022)
- **PRA2022/1**: PRA Rulebook: CRR Firms, SII Firms: Operational Resilience Instrument 2022 (Published: 11/03/2022)
